# Dave Kwiatkowski

> Runner, writer, and software engineer.

## About

Dave Kwiatkowski is a runner, writer, and software engineer. He writes on his Substack at https://davekwiatkowski.substack.com.

## Site Structure

- / — About page with biography, photo, and latest writing
- /#/about — About page
- /#/blog — Redirects to Substack blog
- /#/runs — Race results and ultra-running log

## Links

- Blog: https://davekwiatkowski.substack.com
- Website: https://davekwiatkowski.com

## Content

This is a personal website built with React. The About section contains a biography and links to recent Substack posts. The Runs section contains a log of ultra-running races, adventures, and FKTs (Fastest Known Times) with dates, locations, distances, durations, and results.
